name: Draglesque-The experiment-The Grandhog Day
description:
Draglesque: The Experiment – Groundhog Day
🎟️ Tickets: https://luna--starr-productions.hoopla.no/event/1057167517
Draglesque: The Experiment is a stage concept where drag and burlesque collide, blur, and evolve. Each edition is a new experiment — shaped by the artists, the moment, and the risk of trying something unexpected.
Not only will you experience the artists in their own artistic genres — in our new experiment, Groundhog Day, they are also put to the test.
The same moment repeats itself again and again. One song. Different interpretations. Different artistic expressions.
This evening features performances by: Hey Pistol · Justin Thyme · Bubbly Bella · Artica
Hosted by Luna Sugarcane & Novelty Starr.
✨ After the show: DJ + pop-ups — stay, dance, and hang with us. 
📍 Mir - Lufthavna Grünerløkka
📅 Thursday, March 12
🕖 Doors: 19:00 - Show start: 19:30
Age limit: 20+
